summary_en: Share purchase agreement executed to acquire all shares of Outsourcing Communications (contact center business only) from BREXA Technology, targeting full subsidiary status. Acquisition scheduled for June 2026. Non-contact-center businesses transferred to BREXA Group in April 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Conclusion of Stock Transfer Agreement for Acquisition of Outsourcing Communications Inc. Stock (Full Subsidiary Status)
translation_en_brief:
On May 22, 2026, E-Guardian Inc. (ticker 6050) announced execution of a stock transfer agreement to acquire all shares of Outsourcing Communications Inc. (OSCOM) from BREXA Technology, with the objective of making OSCOM a full subsidiary. The acquisition is limited to OSCOM's contact center business; other businesses have been transferred to the BREXA Group as of April 2026.

The rationale centers on E-Guardian's strategy to build an "AI-BPO" next-generation model combining accumulated operational data, AI technology, and human expertise. The company aims to deploy this model across contact center, back-office, security, and sales/marketing functions. OSCOM brings high-quality dialogue skills and outbound-call capabilities; E-Guardian provides AI technology and extensive conversation datasets. The combination targets a hybrid outbound platform combining AI efficiency with human flexibility.

Short-term synergies include cross-selling via shared customer bases and improved margins through resource optimization. Medium-term targets include higher conversion rates via AI-assisted dialogue tailored to customer context, and improving profit margins as data accumulates and labor costs decouple from incremental sales. Stock acquisition is scheduled for June 2026. Deal value, share count, and purchase price are not disclosed in the available text.
